examples: The hardware and software of cardiotachometer of gymnastic device which based on photoelectric correlated cell is introduced in this paper.
Cimicifuga Romose L. can resist against bacterium, low down the blood pressure, restrain the cardiac muscle, slow down the cardiotachometer, and also sedation.
